scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontened"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontened"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontened
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:playwright
scripts.test:all: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontened && npm run test:e2e --prefix frontened
